description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, black touchscreen display with minimal bezels, displaying a digital clock, date, and notification icons at the top. The back is metallic silver with a vertically striped design and a prominent, octagonal camera module housing four lenses and a flash, positioned near the top center. The sides are slim, with a visible red button on the right edge, likely for power or a special function. The overall build appears to be a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium and robust feel. The device is designed for handheld use and is typical of high-end mobile phones found in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large black touchscreen, metallic silver back, and a prominent octagonal quad-camera module. The device features minimal bezels and a slim profile with a red side button.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black touchscreen display with digital clock, date, and notification icons.
description_view_1: Right side profile highlighting the slimness of the device and a visible red button.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the metallic silver finish, vertical stripes, and octagonal quad-camera module with flash.
description_view_3: Left side profile showing the thin edge with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_brand_logo: Text logo 'PORSCHE DESIGN' and 'HUAWEI' vertically aligned on the back, centered below the camera module, in a subtle contrasting color.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital clock reading '08:08', the date 'Thu, Oct 22', a lock icon with 'Recognizing face...', and notification icons for signal, Wi-Fi, and battery at the top.
attribute_camera_placement: Four camera lenses and a flash are arranged in an octagonal module centered near the top of the back panel.
attribute_button_layout: One red button is visible on the right edge, likely a power or function button; no other buttons are visible.
